Why The Growth Summit

Two days of intensive learning for ambitious professionals

Leadership

Master leadership principles from industry pioneers

Entrepreneurship

Proven frameworks for launching and scaling ventures

Career Clarity

Define your path with strategic direction

Innovation

Stay ahead with future-focused strategies

Learn from founders who built unicorns, Fortune 500 executives, and thought leaders shaping Africa's business future.

Schedule Overview

March 15-16, 2026 • Two identical days of intensive programming

Morning09:00 - 12:00

Keynotes & Panels

Opening keynote, panel discussions, and Q&A sessions with industry leaders.

Afternoon12:00 - 17:00

Workshops & Breakouts

Hands-on workshops, breakout sessions, and skill-building intensives.

Evening17:00 - 19:00

Networking

Structured networking, cocktail reception, and connector sessions.

Both days follow the same schedule • All times EAT (UTC+3)

Registration

Choose the pass that fits your goals. All passes include world-class content and networking.

Limited Time

Early Bird

Perfect for early registrants who want full access at the best price.

$150$250
per person
  • 2-day conference access
  • All keynotes and panels
  • Networking lunch both days
  • Conference materials
  • Digital certificate of attendance
  • Post-event resource access
  • —VIP networking dinner
  • —1-on-1 speaker sessions
Most Popular

Standard

Full access to all conference sessions and networking opportunities.

$250
per person
  • 2-day conference access
  • All keynotes and panels
  • Networking lunch both days
  • Conference materials
  • Digital certificate of attendance
  • Post-event resource access
  • Virtual access included
  • —VIP networking dinner
  • —1-on-1 speaker sessions
Best Value

VIP

Premium experience with exclusive access and personalized sessions.

$500
per person
  • Everything in Standard, plus:
  • VIP reserved seating
  • Exclusive VIP networking dinner
  • 1-on-1 speaker meet & greet
  • Priority Q&A access
  • Premium gift bag
  • Recording access (1 year)
  • Private WhatsApp group

Secure payment • Instant confirmation • Early Bird ends Feb 28
